text:
= 8:37 (8 hrs 37 min)
From sunrise 5 yama (7.5 hrs approx) already passed. Birth
took place in 6th yama of the day. We know that 6th yama is
an even yama. On even yama counting of tatva should be in
reverse order, i.e. from Sky onwards.
Actual duration covered by 5 yamas = 92:07 x 5 = 7:40:35
The time covered in the 6th yama = 8:37:00 - 7:40:35 =
00:56:25
Tatva rising at birth time= 00:56:25 - (Sky+Air+Fire)
= 56:25- (6:08 + 12:07 + 18:25) = 19:35 covered in Water
tatva
That means, during the day, in the 6th yama, during 24:34
(24 min 34 sec) of water tatva rise in that day, when 19:35
(19 min 35 sec) covered, then the birth took place. Now let
us calculate the An tara tatva. We know that in water tatva
Antara tatvas rise in the order Water, Fire, Air, Sky, Earth.
Let us calculate Antara tatva rising at the time of birth.
Water Antara tatva= (24:34/92:07) x 24:34= 6.33
Fire Antara tatva = (24:34/92:07) x 18:25= 4:55
